data.description: Rally is the first AI-powered, onchain marketing protocol where anyone can earn by posting on X.
data.html:
Skip to content
How it WorksPartnersDocsBrand
Join the WaitlistEnter the App

The Future of Influence Starts Here

Rally is the first AI-powered, onchain marketing protocol where anyone can earn by posting on X. If you've got an X account and a following, you're in. Be early. Get access. Earn more.

Featured in:
VentureBeat
TechCrunch
Join the Waitlist & Claim Rewards

Why Join Early

Open to All

Rally is for anyone with a voice and a community. All you need is an X account and a willingness to participate.

Earn Early Bonus Rewards

Join the Waitlist and refer friends to earn more. Points unlock exclusive platform rewards at launch.

Priority Access at Launch

Get priority access for Rally’s public launch. Be first to learn about new opportunities to earn.

Join the Waitlist & Claim Rewards

How Rally Works

No forms. No approvals. Just post and earn. All you need is an X account and a community.

Join a Campaign

Browse live missions from Web3 projects, each designed for engagement on X (Twitter).

Post on X

Complete simple missions like tweeting, retweeting, or tagging others. Rally uses AI to analyze your content and engagement.

Get Paid

Your post is verified by GenLayer’s Intelligent Contracts. If it meets the mission criteria, rewards are distributed instantly—onchain.

Built on Trusted Cutting Edge AI Scaling Technologies

GenLayer

AI-powered smart contracts handle all scoring, verification, and reward distribution--trustless, transparent, and instant.

LayerZero

Omnichain routing bridges rewards across chains. Contributors earn on one network and claim anywhere.

Base

Low-cost, high-speed settlement ensures creators and partners enjoy seamless, gas-efficient payouts.

ZKsync

Zero-knowledge rollups enable scalable, secure execution of campaigns and scoring onchain.

Launch Smarter Campaigns, Powered by AI

Are you a crypto project or brand? Rally lets you run decentralized, performance-based campaigns that:

  • Target real communities, not bots
  • Pay only for verified engagement
  • Settle autonomously with AI-powered contracts
  • Deliver real-time, onchain attribution

Alpha Partner Benefits:

Generous Token Incentive Matching // Early Access // Co-Marketing

Apply to Join the Alpha Program

Coming soon

FAQ

Rally is the first AI-powered, onchain marketing protocol that connects Web3 projects with real communities on X. Creators earn tokens by posting authentic content about campaigns, and AI evaluates the quality and engagement of each post to determine fair payouts.

Simply join the waitlist with your X account. Once campaigns go live, you'll be able to browse available campaigns, create content, and start earning — no application or approval needed.

No. Rally is completely free for creators. You earn tokens by participating in campaigns. There are no sign-up fees, subscription costs, or hidden charges.

Any crypto project, Web3 brand, or protocol can create campaigns on Rally. Alpha partners get priority access, reduced fees, and dedicated support during the early launch phase.

Brands create campaigns with specific goals and budgets. Creators browse live campaigns, post authentic content on X, and our AI evaluates each post for quality, reach, and genuine engagement. Payments settle automatically onchain.

Rewards are distributed in the campaign's specified token. Each campaign details its reward token and payout structure upfront so you know exactly what you'll earn.

Payments are settled onchain after the AI evaluation period for each campaign. This typically happens within a few days of posting, and you can track your earnings in real time on the platform.

Our AI evaluates content quality, relevance to the campaign brief, genuine engagement metrics, audience authenticity, and overall reach. The system is designed to reward authentic, thoughtful content over spam or low-effort posts.

Yes. Rally's AI doesn't just look at follower count — it evaluates engagement rate, content quality, and audience authenticity. Smaller creators with highly engaged communities can earn just as much or more than larger accounts with low engagement.

Rally is fully onchain and AI-powered. There are no middlemen, no manual approvals, and no subjective gatekeeping. Payments are transparent and automatic, evaluation is fair and consistent, and anyone with an X account can participate.
